Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and skills for sustainable development via 'sustainability considerations' (Target 4.7).
evidence: 習得相關進階專業知識(Students will acquire and apply expertise in their respective fields.)
理解與辨別商業環境中道德、社會責任與永續議題 (Students will understand and be able to identify the ethics, social responsibility, and sustainability considerations of business situations.)

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Course teaches business methods for economic productivity (Target 8.2) and explicitly covers 'social responsibility, and sustainability considerations' relevant to business (Targets 8.4, 8.8).
evidence: social responsibility, and sustainability considerations of business situations

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Course develops 'research capabilities' and quantitative methods for innovation (Target 9.5) and applies 'sustainability considerations' to make industries sustainable (Target 9.4).
evidence: 發展必要的研究能力為學術界貢獻 (Students will develop the research capabilities necessary to contribute to academia.)

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: Directly addresses Target 12.6 by teaching students to identify 'sustainability considerations of business situations' and encouraging sustainable corporate practices.
evidence: 理解與辨別商業環境中道德、社會責任與永續議題

Climate Action.reason: The mention of 'sustainability considerations' in a business context infers a link to integrating climate change measures into business planning (Target 13.2).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Promotes business 'ethics' (Target 16.5) and respect for intellectual property ('Respect Copyright'), supporting the rule of law (Target 16.3).
evidence: 道德、社會責任與永續議題
